meta.description: Customer open and cleared items (AR line items, payments).
Accounting document segment (line items for GL, customers, vendors).
Purchasing document header (PO header, vendor, dates, currency).
Purchasing document item (PO line items, materials, quantities, values).
General ledger: totals/line items for new G/L accounting.
Customer sales data (sales area, pricing, related attributes).
Vendor company code (vendor accounting, payment terms).
Outbound delivery header (delivery documents, shipping dates, quantities, ship-to).
Outbound delivery item (products, quantities, reference to sales order).
Plant data for material (plant-level material attributes).
Units of measure for material (UOM conversion).
Material document header (goods movement header, posting date).
Sales data for materials (sales org, distribution channel, pricing group).
Vendor invoice header (invoice document, vendor, amount, currency).
Vendor invoice item (invoice line items, materials, quantities, amounts).
Sales document header (orders, customers, dates, overall values).
Sales document item (ordered products, quantities, values).
Schedule lines for sales document items (delivery quantities and dates).
Billing document header (invoice-level amounts, dates, currencies, customers).
